meta.benchmark: SPHERIC Test 10 / Delorme et al. 2009 (lateral impact, water)
meta.note: Single 2D realisation vs the experimental first-peak distribution (strongly stochastic, CoV ~20%); 2D omits out-of-plane-thickness dependence and air entrapment.

published_pressure_pa.quantity: Sensor 1, first-peak, water, 1X thickness; mean +/- SD (100 runs)
published_pressure_pa.source: Botia-Vera, Souto-Iglesias, Bulian & Lobovsky (2010), Table II (100 runs); Delorme et al. (2009), Ocean Eng. 36(2)
